forest-g3.title: Forest Clearing
text: A quiet forest clearing filled with drifting silver fog.
A small pond reflects the faint sky between branches.

pond.roomDesc: A still pond sits at the centre of the clearing, its surface unbroken.
pond.lookText: A still pond with a single fish that seems to be laughing at you.

rock.roomText: A rock sits half-buried in the mud near the water's edge.
